description: Every Tripadvisor Content API endpoint, plus a local store and ranked compare/best/drift commands no other Tripadvisor tool has.

tools.name: find_search
tools.description: Search locations by name. Returns location_id + name + address you can pass to show/reviews/photos. Required: query. Optional: category, lat-long, radius (plus 4 more).

params.name: query
params.description: Text to search for, e.g. 'Boston Harbor Hotel' or 'Paris'

params.name: category
params.description: Restrict results to a place type

tools.name: near_search
tools.description: Find locations near 'lat,long'. Returns location_id + name + address. Required: lat-long. Optional: category, radius, radius-unit (plus 3 more).

params.name: category
params.description: Restrict results to a place type

params.name: radius
params.description: Radius from the center point (use with --radius-unit)

tools.name: photos_list
tools.description: Photos for a location_id with thumbnail/medium/large/original URLs. Content API caps at 5. Required: location-id. Optional: limit (default: 5), offset, source (plus 1 more). Returns array of Photo.

params.name: location-id
params.description: Tripadvisor location_id from a find/near result

params.name: limit
params.description: Max photos to return (Content API hard-caps at 5)

params.name: offset
params.description: Index of first photo for pagination

params.name: source
params.description: Comma-separated source filter: Expert, Management, Traveler

tools.name: reviews_list
tools.description: Recent reviews for a location_id. Review text is user-generated content; the free Content API caps this at 5 most-recent reviews. Required: location-id. Optional: limit (default: 5), offset, language (default: en). Returns array of Review.

params.name: location-id
params.description: Tripadvisor location_id from a find/near result

params.name: limit
params.description: Max reviews to return (Content API hard-caps at 5)

params.name: offset
params.description: Index of first review for pagination

tools.name: show_details
tools.description: Full details for one location_id. Leads with rating, num_reviews, and ranking so agents can compare options. Required: location-id. Optional: language (default: en), currency (default: USD). Returns the LocationDetails.

params.name: location-id
params.description: Tripadvisor location_id from a find/near result
